items.title: Uruguay, Utd's Ugarte suffers knee ligament injury...
items.summary: Uruguay midfielder Manuel Ugarte has suffered a knee ligament injury in his final World Cup group stage match against Spain, Manchester United have confirmed.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Jesse Marsch 'Doesn't Care' If USA Joins Canada In World Cup Round of 16
items.summary: After Canada became the first country to qualify for the World Cup round of 16, Jesse Marsch, its American coach, said he doesn't care if the USA joins the Reds there.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Injured Raducanu withdraws from Wimbledon
items.summary: Emma Raducanu is out of Wimbledon after withdrawing on the eve of her home Grand Slam tournament with a leg injury.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.
